variants.title: HiFi Filter SA 16913 Air Filter
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SA 16913 Air Filter. Easy to install and replace, the SA 16913 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
specifications: Style: AIR FILTER, Dimension 1 (D1): 159.0 mm, Dimension 2 (D2): 157.0 mm, Dimension 3 (D3): 151.0 mm, Height 1 (H1): 235.0 mm, Height 2 (H2): 222.0 mm

variants.title: Fleetguard AF55030 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16913
variants.option1Value: Fleetguard AF55030 Air Filter | Replaces the HiFi Filter SA 16913
variants.description: ​Fleetguard® AF55030 Direct Flow primary air filter's technology offers better engine protection and lower maintenance costs within a smaller profile than conventional air filtration systems.
